🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h ESE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 10.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind • Long period - powerful waves
